productDisplayName: Fila Unisex Aqua Gripparre Brown Sandals
description: Get ready to float in comfort this monsoon and wade through the water with these Aqua Grippare floaters from fila. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Upper Textile upper with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug Fit Diagonal straps connecting the forefoot and ankle strap for a better fit and to lock the foot in place Embossed logo on ankle strap for style Midsole Cushioned and grooved footbed to drain out accumulated water Mesh midsole to drain out excess water Outsole TPR outsole with grooves to drain away water that seeps in from the mesh midsole through the outsole Suction point for great grip and stability on wet surfaces shoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
